div.i: Both flows are structurally identical. Key differences from standard order flow:

li.i: Only direct recipients are supported (phone number / email address) —
no NIN, org number, or Profile API lookup
Notifications are dispatched via a synchronous HTTP call, not via ASB queue
A single NotificationOrder is persisted (no chain / reminders).

i.i: Delivery reports are still received asynchronously.

switch.text: Both flows are structurally identical. Key differences from standard order flow:...
